desc: Highly visible 8-unit retail and office building at the corner of Route 88 and Midstreams Place. Excellent parking. Outstanding investment opportunity. Rent roll and expenses available through the listing agent. Do not approach tenants.
description:
Highly visible 8-unit retail and office building at the signalized corner of Route 88 and Midstreams Place in Brick — offering outstanding investment potential with strong traffic counts and excellent tenant exposure.

The property features excellent parking, a mix of retail and office suites, and is located in a densely populated trade area. Full rent roll and expense detail available through the listing agent. Please do not approach or contact tenants directly.
